items.placeName: Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: Tucked away on the quieter Ông Lang coast, Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc earns its 4.6-star reputation with good reason. The minimalist villas feel genuinely private, the infinity pool looks straight out onto the Gulf of Thailand, and the open-air gym means you can skip a workout with a sea breeze as your excuse. Dining is on-site, so you never have to rush anywhere. Practical tip: Ông Lang beach is calmer and less crowded than the south, making Chen Sea a great base if you want a peaceful alternative to the busier resort strips.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the infinity pool blur right into the horizon, villas peeking through the palms, and that open-air gym with a view that makes exercise feel optional. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc on the Ông Lang coast is giving quiet-luxury energy, and the Gulf of Thailand backdrop does all the heavy lifting.

instagram.caption: Minimalist villas, an infinity pool that melts into the Gulf of Thailand, and the peaceful Ông Lang shoreline right outside your door. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc is the quiet-luxury escape the island does so well. Rated 4.6 from 869 reviews, and honestly, you can see why.
instagram.video_caption: Infinity pool. Palm-framed villas. An open-air gym with zero excuses needed. Chen Sea Resort & Spa Phu Quoc on the Ông Lang coast is a whole vibe, and the Gulf of Thailand is just there in the background, no big deal.

tiktok.caption: This quiet corner of Phu Quoc just reset my whole standard for beach resorts. Chen Sea Resort & Spa, Ông Lang coast. Go. #PhuQuoc #ChenSeaResort #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc's quiet side hits different
scenes: Minimalist villas tucked in the palms
Infinity pool meets the Gulf of Thailand
Open-air gym with a sea view

facebook.caption: Tucked along the quieter shores of Ong Lang, Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc earns its 4.7-star reputation with ease. Stylish rooms, two on-site restaurants, a sprawling outdoor pool, and a full spa mean you rarely need to leave the property. If you are looking for a polished beach escape away from the busier southern end of the island, this is a strong pick. Practical tip: Ong Lang Beach is calmer and less crowded than Bãi Trường, which makes it especially lovely for a morning swim.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the morning light hit that outdoor pool and suddenly your inbox feels very far away. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc packages up chic rooms, beachside calm, two restaurants, and a spa into one effortless stay on Ong Lang's quiet shore. Rated 4.7 from over 4,700 reviews. This one speaks for itself.

instagram.caption: Quiet beach, chic rooms, a spa, and two restaurants all in one place. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc on Ong Lang shore is your escape from the crowds, rated 4.7 from 4,700+ guests. Tip: Ong Lang Beach is calmer than Bãi Trường. Perfect for slow mornings.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Beach. Spa. Repeat. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc is doing resort life right on the calm shores of Ong Lang. Rated 4.7 from 4,700+ guests and honestly, you can see why.

tiktok.caption: Quiet beach, spa, pool, two restaurants. Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phu Quoc is that resort. 4.7 stars. Ong Lang shore. Go. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryResort #VietnamTravel #BeachVacation

scenes: Chic rooms with a coastal feel

items.placeName: Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a polished resort experience on Phu Quoc without the guesswork, Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc is a genuinely strong pick. Sitting along Đường Bào, this property earns its 4.7-star rating across nearly 8,000 reviews, which tells you it consistently delivers for international travelers. Expect well-kept rooms, solid amenities, and that reassuring international-brand reliability paired with a tropical island setting. Practical tip: book directly through the resort or the official Best Western site to access the best rate guarantees and avoid third-party surprises.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the pool, the lobby, and those room views do all the talking. Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc shows up beautifully on camera, and the 4.7 rating from close to 8,000 guests backs up every frame. Located on Đường Bào, this is resort life on Phu Quoc done right.

instagram.caption: Nearly 8,000 reviews and a 4.7 rating. Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc on Đường Bào is the kind of resort that takes the stress out of planning your Phu Quoc stay. Reliable, polished, and genuinely island-beautiful.
instagram.video_caption: Pools, tropical greenery, and a 4.7 from almost 8,000 guests. Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc on Đường Bào earns every bit of the hype. This is your sign to book it.

tiktok.caption: 4.7 stars, nearly 8,000 reviews. Best Western Premier Sonasea Phu Quoc on Đường Bào is quietly one of the best-value resort stays on the island. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #HotelReview

facebook.caption: Tahiti Hotel on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo keeps things refreshingly simple. Rated 4.3/5 across 617 reviews, this casual beachside spot offers understated rooms, an outdoor pool, and for some lucky guests, direct beach access right from their accommodation. It sits in a quieter stretch of Phu Quoc's main strip, making it a solid base without the resort price tag. Practical tip: when booking, filter specifically for beach-access rooms if that feature matters to you, as not all rooms include it.
facebook.video_caption: Pool light catching the afternoon sun, a short walk to the sand, and that easy Phu Quoc pace kicking in. Clips from Tahiti Hotel show exactly why low-key sometimes wins. Clean outdoor pool, casual common spaces, and those beach-access rooms doing most of the talking.

instagram.caption: Simple done right. Tahiti Hotel earns its 4.3/5 with an outdoor pool, casual vibes, and select rooms with beach access on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. A relaxed, practical base for exploring Phu Quoc without overcomplicating things.
instagram.video_caption: That moment you realise your hotel has beach access AND a pool. Tahiti Hotel, Phu Quoc. Laid-back, honest value, and 617 guests agree it delivers.

tiktok.caption: Beach access + outdoor pool at Tahiti Hotel, Phu Quoc. Casual, honest, 4.3 stars. Sometimes simple is the move. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #BeachHotel #TravelTips

video_script.hook: Beach access. Pool. Keep it simple.

items.placeName: Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc

facebook.caption: Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc earns its name every single evening. Sitting right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, this 4.5-star-rated resort gives guests a front-row seat to some of the most vivid sunsets on the island. With 680 reviews backing it up, the consistency here speaks for itself. Whether you're after a relaxed poolside afternoon or a beachfront evening drink, this spot delivers that easy, unhurried Phu Quoc energy foreign visitors come looking for. Practical tip: book a west-facing room or arrive at the beach bar early evening to catch the golden hour at its best.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sky turn gold right from the shoreline at Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc. The clips say it all, warm water, glowing horizon, cold drink in hand. This is what a Phu Quoc sunset actually looks like when you find the right spot for it.

instagram.caption: Sunsets hit different at Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc. Rated 4.5 stars across 680 reviews, this beachfront retreat on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is your sign to plan that golden hour properly. Pro tip: arrive early to claim your spot.
instagram.video_caption: Golden skies, warm sand, zero regrets. Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc is living up to every bit of its name, and the view from the beach proves it.

tiktok.caption: This is what sunset o'clock looks like at Vida Loca Resort & Sunset Beach Phu Quoc. 4.5 stars, 680 reviews, zero disappointments. #PhuQuoc #VidaLocaResort #VietnamTravel #SunsetVibes

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc sunsets just got better
scenes: Beachfront on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo

facebook.caption: Eco Lagoon is quietly earning its 4.9-star reputation on Phu Quoc, and it is not hard to see why. Tucked along Lê Bát, this resort hotel wraps guests in a lagoon-side setting that feels a world away from the busier strips of the island. With 173 reviews averaging near-perfect, it consistently delivers on comfort, nature, and that rare sense of calm. Practical tip: book directly with the resort to ask about room views, since lagoon-facing rooms are the ones guests rave about most.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the water catch the morning light at Eco Lagoon, where the lagoon is practically part of the room. These clips show exactly why guests keep returning, peaceful surroundings, lush greenery, and an atmosphere that makes you forget you even have a phone. This is Phu Quoc at its most unhurried.

instagram.caption: Eco Lagoon on Phu Quoc is scoring a 4.9 from 173 guests, and the lagoon setting at Lê Bát makes it very easy to understand. Calm, lush, and genuinely off the beaten path. Ask for a lagoon-view room when you book.
instagram.video_caption: Lagoon reflections, tropical greenery, and a silence you can actually feel. Eco Lagoon on Phu Quoc is giving 4.9-star energy in every single frame.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars and a lagoon view waiting for you at Eco Lagoon, Phu Quoc. This one is hard to scroll past. #EcoLagoon #PhuQuocTravel #VietnamResort #IslandVibes

scenes: Lê Bát, away from the crowds
Lagoon-facing rooms are the ones to book

items.placeName: Phu Quoc Marina - Integrated Resort Complex

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a resort that combines relaxed island living with a full entertainment complex, Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường is worth a serious look. Rated 4.5/5 by guests, this integrated resort sits right along one of Phu Quoc's most scenic coastal stretches, giving you easy access to the beach alongside the amenities of a large resort complex. It's a strong choice for travelers who want more than just a room, whether that means dining, leisure facilities, or simply a polished base for island exploration. Tip: ask about sunset-facing room options when you book.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind the South China Sea from the grounds of Phu Quoc Marina. The clips show off the scale of this integrated complex at Marina Bãi Trường, from the waterfront atmosphere to the resort facilities that keep guests busy well past check-in. A 4.5-star experience on one of Phu Quoc's best coastal corridors.

instagram.caption: Big resort energy, island pace. Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường earns its 4.5/5 with a full integrated complex right on the coast. A polished, well-rounded stay for those who want it all in one place. Pro tip: request a sunset-facing room.
instagram.video_caption: The waterfront, the facilities, the Phu Quoc golden hour. Phu Quoc Marina at Marina Bãi Trường shows you exactly why integrated resort living on this island just works.

tiktok.caption: This integrated resort on Marina Bãi Trường might just be your perfect Phu Quoc base. 4.5/5 and it shows. #PhuQuocMarina #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #PhuQuocVietnam

video_script.cta: Link in bio to plan your stay

facebook.caption: No trip to Phu Quoc feels complete without at least one evening at Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. This bustling night market on Đường Nguyễn Trãi comes alive after sunset with rows of seafood grills, local snacks, handmade souvenirs, and the kind of lively energy that makes you want to linger for hours. With nearly 6,000 reviews averaging 4 out of 5 stars, it clearly delivers for most visitors. Come hungry, bring small cash for easy haggling, and arrive before 8 PM to beat the thickest crowds.
facebook.video_caption: Smoke rising from seafood grills, colorful stalls stretching as far as you can see, and the whole island seeming to gather in one place after dark. That is the vibe at Chợ đêm Phú Quốc every single night. Watch the clips and tell us, what would you order first?

instagram.caption: Sunset means one thing in Phu Quoc: head straight to Chợ đêm Phú Quốc. Grilled seafood, local snacks, souvenir hunting, and seriously good people-watching. Bring cash and come hungry.
instagram.video_caption: Grill smoke, glowing lanterns, and a whole lot of delicious chaos. Chợ đêm Phú Quốc after dark is pure sensory overload in the best possible way. Would you survive without overspending?

tiktok.caption: Chợ đêm Phú Quốc at night is everything. Seafood, snacks, souvenirs, and total island vibes. Bring cash! #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #NightMarket #StreetFood

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc after dark hits different
scenes: Welcome to Chợ đêm Phú Quốc
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: If your suitcase has room for one more thing, LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is worth a stop. This little gift shop sits right in the heart of Phu Quoc's evening scene and holds a remarkable 4.9/5 from nearly a thousand reviews, which tells you visitors genuinely love what they find here. Think curated souvenirs, local keepsakes, and the kind of finds you won't spot in every airport duty-free. Practical tip: come in the evening when the street buzzes with life and browsing feels like part of the whole night-out experience.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the shelves fill your screen with color. LOCA - Night Market packs a lot of charm into a small space, and the clips show exactly why nearly a thousand happy shoppers gave it a near-perfect score. Evening light, great finds, zero regrets about the extra luggage weight.

instagram.caption: Souvenir shopping just got a serious upgrade. LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is rated 4.9/5 by nearly 1,000 visitors, and one evening browse will show you why. Come after dark for the full vibe.
instagram.video_caption: Colorful shelves, happy shoppers, and a 4.9-star reputation that speaks for itself. LOCA - Night Market is your sign to save room in that suitcase.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars from 941 people at a gift shop in Phu Quoc. LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo might be tiny but it delivers. #PhuQuoc #NightMarket #VietnamTravel #SouvenirHunting

scenes: Right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo

items.placeName: PHU QUOC NIGHT MARKET & LOCAL FOOD

facebook.caption: If there's one evening stop you shouldn't skip in Phu Quoc, it's the night market along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Stalls light up after sunset with fresh seafood, grilled skewers, tropical fruit shakes, and local snacks you won't find on a restaurant menu. It's lively, affordable, and gives you a real taste of how locals and travelers share the same street. Tip: arrive around 6 PM before the crowds peak, and bring small cash for faster shopping. Rated 4.2/5 across 310 reviews.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the grills fire up, the lanterns glow, and the whole street come alive after dark. This is Đường Trần Hưng Đạo at night, and it moves fast. Grab a skewer in one hand, a fruit shake in the other, and just follow the smoke.

instagram.caption: Sunset hits, and Đường Trần Hưng Đạo transforms into one of Phu Quoc's most vibrant spots. Fresh seafood, grilled skewers, fruit shakes, and glowing stalls as far as you can see. Come hungry, bring cash, arrive early. Rated 4.2/5.
instagram.video_caption: Grills sizzling, lanterns glowing, stalls packed with everything delicious. The night market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is Phu Quoc after dark at its best.

tiktok.caption: The Phu Quoc night market hits different after dark. Fresh seafood, glowing stalls, and snacks everywhere. Go hungry. #PhuQuoc #StreetFood #VietnamTravel #NightMarket

video_script.hook: Phu Quoc after dark hits different
scenes: Stalls light up along Đường Trần Hưng Đạo
Fresh seafood straight off the grill
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: If you want to see how locals actually shop in Phu Quoc, Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc is the place to go. This bustling wet market in the heart of Dương Đông town is packed with fresh seafood pulled straight from the boats, tropical fruits, local snacks, and everyday goods that give you a real feel for island life. It holds a solid 4.3/5 from nearly 400 reviews, and the energy here is something no resort breakfast can replicate. Come early in the morning for the freshest produce and the most authentic atmosphere, and bring small cash, as most vendors don't do cards. A great stop before or after exploring the town.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the morning rush unfold at Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc. Vendors arranging towers of tropical fruit, tanks of live seafood, and locals haggling over the day's catch. This is Phu Quoc before the tourist trail kicks in, raw, colorful, and completely worth the early wake-up.

instagram.caption: Skip the resort buffet one morning and head to Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc instead. Fresh seafood, tropical fruit, local snacks, and pure island energy. Rated 4.3/5 by nearly 400 visitors. Go early, bring cash, and soak it all in.
instagram.video_caption: Fresh fish, ripe mangoes, and morning chaos in the best way possible. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc is your front-row seat to real island life. Set that alarm.

tiktok.caption: This is what Phu Quoc looks like before the tourists wake up. Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc hits different at 7am. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #LocalMarket #TravelTok

scenes: Welcome to Chợ Dương Đông Phú Quốc
Fresh seafood straight off the boats
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: Tucked inside a lively market area in Phu Quoc, Lemon Queen has earned a loyal following, and one visit makes it easy to see why. With a solid 4.5 out of 5 stars across 737 reviews, this little kiosk punches well above its size. Stop by to browse local goods, soak up the buzzing atmosphere, and pick up something you won't find back home. Practical tip: arrive early for the best selection and shorter queues.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the colour and energy of Lemon Queen come to life. Shoppers weaving through stalls, fresh finds stacked up, smiles all around. This is the kind of market stop that turns into a highlight of your whole trip to Phu Quoc.

instagram.caption: 4.5 stars, 737 reviews, and a whole lot of charm. Lemon Queen at the market in Phu Quoc is the kind of spot locals love and visitors remember. Go early, go curious.
instagram.video_caption: Bright stalls, busy hands, great finds. Lemon Queen is giving all the right market vibes in Phu Quoc and the crowd of happy shoppers says everything.

tiktok.caption: This little kiosk in Phu Quoc has 737 fans and counting. Lemon Queen is a must-stop. #PhuQuoc #VietnamTravel #MarketFinds #HiddenGem
